tools.name: analyze
tools.description: Run LLM analysis on recent events

tools.name: calibrate
tools.description: Recompute per-op p50 cost hints from .cortex/db/dag_traces.jsonl

tools.name: capture
tools.description: Capture event from stdin (used by AI tools)

tools.name: cli
tools.description: Route slash command arguments for /cortex

tools.name: code
tools.description: Run the Cortex coding harness against a workdir (requires --workdir and --model)

tools.name: daemon
tools.description: Run background context processor

tools.name: dream-debug
tools.description: Run Dream cycles synchronously and dump regions + fractal metadata

tools.name: embed
tools.description: Embed text to a vector (and optionally store under doc_id/content_type)

flags.name: bulk
flags.description: Read NDJSON {doc_id, content_type?, text} from stdin and store each. Implies --store.

flags.name: content-type
flags.description: Content type bucket for stored embeddings

flags.name: doc-id
flags.description: Content ID to store the embedding under (required when --store is set without --bulk)

flags.name: store
flags.description: Store the resulting vector instead of just emitting it

flags.name: workdir
flags.description: Open storage rooted at <workdir>/.cortex (required with --store or --bulk)

tools.name: entities
tools.description: Show knowledge graph entities

tools.name: eval
tools.description: Run evaluation scenarios

tools.name: feed
tools.description: Seed knowledge from files or directories

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Remove outdated context

tools.name: graph
tools.description: Show entity relationship graph

tools.name: info
tools.description: Show system info and model recommendations

tools.name: ingest
tools.description: Move queued events to database

tools.name: init
tools.description: Initialize Cortex in the current directory

tools.name: inject-context
tools.description: Inject relevant context into prompt for hooks

tools.name: insights
tools.description: Show extracted insights

tools.name: install
tools.description: Install Cortex hooks for Claude Code

tools.name: journal
tools.description: Journal operations (rebuild, replay, verify, show, tail, migrate, ingest)

tools.name: mcp
tools.description: Start MCP server (for cross-tool access)

tools.name: measure
tools.description: Measure prompt quality for small context windows

tools.name: overview
tools.description: Show context overview (visual summary)

tools.name: process
tools.description: Process queue + analyze (backward compat)

tools.name: projects
tools.description: List registered projects

tools.name: prune
tools.description: Check/manage context size relative to project

tools.name: recent
tools.description: Show recent captured events

tools.name: reembed
tools.description: Re-generate embeddings with current model

tools.name: repl
tools.description: Start an interactive coding REPL in the current directory (default model: qwen2.5-coder:1.5b via Ollama)

tools.name: run
tools.description: Run a DAG by type (turn|think|dream|capture|eval)

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search context using cognitive retrieval

args.name: query
args.description: Search query (free text; words joined with spaces)

flags.name: json
flags.description: Emit a single JSON envelope on stdout with full result content (no truncation)

flags.name: mode
flags.description: Retrieval mode: fast (Reflex only) or full (Reflex + Reflect)

flags.name: workdir
flags.description: Open storage rooted at <workdir>/.cortex (overrides default global storage)

tools.name: search-vector
tools.description: Vector-search the workdir's storage (--text or --vector); JSON output

flags.name: content-type
flags.description: Filter results to a single content type bucket (empty = no filter)

flags.name: text
flags.description: Query text — embed and search in one shot

flags.name: threshold
flags.description: Minimum similarity score to include (0.0 = no filter)

flags.name: top-k
flags.description: Maximum number of results to return

flags.name: vector
flags.description: Pre-computed query vector as JSON array (alternative to --text)

tools.name: session-start
tools.description: Print session start instructions for hooks

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Show storage statistics

tools.name: status
tools.description: Show status (for status line)

tools.name: stop
tools.description: Handle session stop and capture transcript for hooks

tools.name: test
tools.description: Test LLM analysis quality

tools.name: tools
tools.description: Generate the tools.json manifest from the command registry

flags.name: check
flags.description: Verify the committed manifest matches the generator output; exit 1 on drift

flags.name: out
flags.description: Path to write manifest to (use '-' for stdout)

flags.name: version
flags.description: Version string stamped on tools without their own SurfaceVersion (defaults to binary version)

tools.name: uninstall
tools.description: Remove Cortex hooks from Claude Code

tools.name: watch
tools.description: Watch cognitive activity in real-time
